title: C Memory Outcomes, Evidence, and Toolchain Boundaries · Object-Lifetime Lens: Transfer Evidence Plan
summary: A civic sensor team must distinguish a passing browser model from evidence that its native C release is safe on supported targets. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem transfer evidence plan increment in memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Transfer Evidence Plan · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 8995. Produce bounded C evidence to separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Transfer Evidence Plan contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Transfer Evidence Plan · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan.

For Predict Transfer Evidence Plan · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan, keep Transfer Evidence Plan connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.

steps.title: Build Transfer Evidence Plan evidence · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
For this theory demonstration of cmem-transfer-evidence-plan, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-transfer-evidence-plan-9n3v4p */" for changed case 4407. It must separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.

Evidence target: Build Transfer Evidence Plan evidence · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Transfer Evidence Plan into observable performance evidence. For Build Transfer Evidence Plan evidence · Theory Transfer Evidence Plan, keep Transfer Evidence Plan connected to executable C memory invariant and explicit native transfer evidence.
